---
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

## Overview of Some URDB Data

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(arrow)
library(gt)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| label: tbl-metrics
#| tbl-cap: "Overall Dataset Metrics"

df <- read_parquet("./urdb_rates_2021_2026.parquet")

rates_summary <- df |> 
  summarize(
    total_rows = n(),
    # Energy Rate Summary
    avg_energy = mean(total_energy_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_energy = min(total_energy_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_energy = max(total_energy_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    na_energy  = sum(as.integer(is.na(total_energy_rate))),
    
    # Demand Rate Summary
    avg_demand = mean(total_energy_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_demand = min(total_energy_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_demand = max(total_energy_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    na_demand  = sum(as.integer(is.na(total_energy_rate))),
    
    # Fixed Charge Summary
    avg_fixed  = mean(fixedChargeFirstMeter, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_fixed  = max(fixedChargeFirstMeter, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_fixed  = min(fixedChargeFirstMeter, na.rm = TRUE),
    na_fixed   = sum(as.integer(is.na(fixedChargeFirstMeter)))
  ) |> 
  collect()

rates_summary |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Sample Utility Rates Dataset Profile",
  ) |>
  fmt_integer(total_rows, pattern = "{x} rows") |>
  fmt_currency(columns = c(avg_energy, min_energy, max_energy, avg_fixed, max_fixed)) |>
  cols_label(
    total_rows = "Total Count",
    avg_energy = "Avg Energy Rate",
    max_energy = "Max Energy Rate",
    min_energy = "Min Energy Rate",
    na_energy = "Missing Energy",
    avg_demand = "Avg Demand Rate",
    max_demand = "Max Demand Rate",
    min_demand = "Min Demand Rate",
    na_demand = "Missing Demand",
    max_fixed = "Max Fixed Charge",
    min_fixed = "Min Fixed Charge",
    avg_fixed = "Avg Fixed Charge",
    na_fixed = "Missing Fixed Charge"
  ) |>
  opt_interactive(use_search = TRUE) # Makes the table searchable in the HTML doc
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
hourly_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(hour, week_part) %>%
  summarize(avg_energy_rate = mean(total_energy_rate, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  collect() # <--- THIS is the magic word. It executes the query and brings the small summary into memory.

ggplot(hourly_summary, aes(x = hour, y = avg_energy_rate, color = week_part)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +  # Changed 'size' to 'linewidth'
  geom_point(size = 2) +      # 'size' is still correct for points
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    color = "Portion of Week",              
    x = "Hour of the Day",                     
    y = "Average Energy Rate ($/kWh)", 
    title = "Hourly Energy Rate Trends"
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
hourly_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(month, hour, week_part) %>%
  summarize(avg_energy_rate = mean(total_energy_rate, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  collect() # <--- THIS is the magic word. It executes the query and brings the small summary into memory.

ggplot(hourly_summary, aes(x = hour, y = avg_energy_rate, color = week_part)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +  # Changed 'size' to 'linewidth'
  geom_point(size = 2) +      # 'size' is still correct for points
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    color = "Portion of Week",              
    x = "Hour of the Day",                     
    y = "Average Energy Rate ($/kWh)", 
    title = "Hourly Energy Rate Trends"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~month
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
hourly_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(hour, week_part) %>%
  summarize(avg_demand_rate = mean(total_demand_rate, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  collect() # <--- THIS is the magic word. It executes the query and brings the small summary into memory.

ggplot(hourly_summary, aes(x = hour, y = avg_demand_rate, color = week_part)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +  # Changed 'size' to 'linewidth'
  geom_point(size = 2) +      # 'size' is still correct for points
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    color = "Portion of Week",              
    x = "Hour of the Day",                     
    y = "Average Demand Rate ($/kW)", 
    title = "Hourly Demand Rate Trends"
  ) 
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
hourly_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(month, hour, week_part) %>%
  summarize(avg_demand_rate = mean(total_demand_rate, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  collect() # <--- THIS is the magic word. It executes the query and brings the small summary into memory.

ggplot(hourly_summary, aes(x = hour, y = avg_demand_rate, color = week_part)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +  # Changed 'size' to 'linewidth'
  geom_point(size = 2) +      # 'size' is still correct for points
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    color = "Portion of Week",              
    x = "Hour of the Day",                     
    y = "Average Demand Rate ($/kW)", 
    title = "Hourly Demand Rate Trends"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~month
  )
```
